description_long: This object is a realistic crab with a broad, oval-shaped carapace that is dark brown on the dorsal side and pale on the ventral side. The crab features two large, upward-curving claws (chelae) with spiny edges and prominent joints, as well as eight segmented walking legs that are slender and slightly curved. The carapace is textured with small bumps and ridges, and the eyes are set on short stalks at the front, flanked by two visible antennae. The ventral side is smoother and lighter in color, with the segmentation of the abdomen visible beneath the carapace. The overall appearance is naturalistic, with a hard, glossy exoskeleton typical of marine crustaceans. The crab is shown at a scale comparable to a small household object, as indicated by the reference cube.
description: A lifelike crab with a dark, textured shell, large spiny claws, and eight slender legs, featuring a hard, glossy exoskeleton and visible eye stalks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad carapace, both large claws raised, and the eyes and antennae clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the body, the curvature of the claws, and the segmentation of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pale underside, the segmentation of the abdomen, and the legs splayed outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the claws and legs, with the carapace's edge and spines visible.
